title: coreopsis schlechteri
intro: Coreopsis schlechteri, also known as the Coreopsis or tickseed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis schlechteri include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on individual circumstances.
